title: Fantasy 2025–26 — rookie-RB conviction draft, Mar 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • 2025–26 fantasy draft cheat sheet. Yahir's tier rankings written Mar 9 2025, modified through Aug 2025.
  • First-round conviction: Bijan > Gibbs > Barkley; CD = Nabers; Jeanty > Jacobs > Achane > J.Taylor; Amon-Ra > Brian Thomas Jr > Puka.
  • Round 2: Davante Adams, CMC ("practiced every practice, RBs gone, Sittio gone").
  • Round 3: Drake London > Nico ("gonna miss 4 games") > AJ Brown.
  • WR2 grid: McConkey > JSN > Garrett Wilson; Sutton > DK > Rice ("has m eye Achane's eyes") > Worthy.
  • Round 4 sleepers: Omarion Hampton ("run run run Harbaugh"), Achane, Calvin Ridley, Jacoby Meyers, Justin Fields ("OP fantasy QB, not great irl QB").
  • Avoid list: DeVonta Smith, Jonathan Taylor, Joe Mixon, Najee Harris.
  • Breakouts: Achane, RJ Harvey, Gibbs, Ricky Pearsall, Calvin Ridley.
  • Post-round-10 sleepers: Bill Croskey-Merritt, Ollie Gordon, Damien Pierce / Woody Marks, Dillon Sampson, Harold Fannin Jr, Bhayshul Tuten.
  • Ends with "200 app/admin fee / 500" — likely buy-in math for the league.

Conviction signal

"Chase Brown will be a household name."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Third installment in the fantasy trilogy (2022 06 14 fantasy 2022 josh allen, 2024 07 30 fantasy football, this). Diff vs prior years:
    • 2025 leans rookie-RB heavy in a way 2022 and 2024 did not — Bijan + Gibbs + Jeanty + Hampton + Harvey + Henderson all in top picks.
    • Justin Fields as fantasy-QB-not-irl-QB distinction = Yahir thinking about system-fit vs talent, a frame that recurs in his Rankett positioning.
  • The avoid list — DeVonta, JT, Mixon, Najee — is a useful read on counter-consensus picks Yahir will short.
  • Pairs with 2025 09 23 how im scraping by (gym-job-as-bridge) for the same person, same week range, two opposite domains: scraping for rent ↔ drafting Bijan first overall.

Open questions

  • League buy-in confirmed at $500?
  • Has the season validated the "Chase Brown will be a household name" call?
